phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Petit Prince statue is located
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve la statue du Petit Prince, s'il vous plaît ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV lah stah-TOO doo puh-TEE PRANSE, seel voo PLEH
phrases.cultural_note: Antoine de Saint-Exupéry, author of The Little Prince, was born in Lyon. A bronze statue of him and the Petit Prince stands on Place Bellecour.

responses.english: At the south-west corner of the square.
responses.phonetic: oh KWEHN sood-WEST duh lah PLAHS
responses.french: Au coin sud-ouest de la place.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to get to the Presqu'île from here
phrases.text_local: Comment rejoindre la Presqu'île depuis ici ?
phrases.pronunciation: koh-MAHN ruh-ZHWANDR lah presk-EEL duh-PWEE ee-SEE
phrases.cultural_note: Place Bellecour sits at the heart of the Presqu'île, the peninsula between the Saône and the Rhône. Most of the city's main shopping and dining streets radiate from here.

responses.phonetic: too DRWAH, seh ah sehnk mee-NOOT
responses.french: Tout droit, c'est à cinq minutes.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for the nearest tourist information office
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve l'office de tourisme le plus proche ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV loh-FEES duh too-REEZM luh ploo PROSH
phrases.cultural_note: The main Lyon tourist office is located on Place Bellecour itself — very convenient for maps, Lyon City Cards, and guided tour bookings.

responses.english: At the corner of the square, over there.
responses.phonetic: oh KWEHN duh lah PLAHS, lah-BAH
responses.french: Au coin de la place, là-bas.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the Christmas market held here
phrases.text_local: Quand a lieu le marché de Noël sur la place ?
phrases.pronunciation: kahn ah lyuh luh mar-SHAY duh noh-EL soor lah PLAS
phrases.cultural_note: The Lyon Christmas market runs throughout December on Place Bellecour. The square is also the launch point for the famous Fête des Lumières light festival each 8 December.

phrases.intent_en: Ask a taxi driver to take you here
phrases.text_local: Conduisez-moi à la Place Bellecour, s'il vous plaît.
phrases.pronunciation: kohn-dwee-ZAY-mwah ah lah PLAS bel-KOOR, seel voo PLEH
phrases.cultural_note: Place Bellecour is the central reference point of Lyon. Taxi drivers will know it immediately — it is the largest pedestrian square in France.
